fields.name: tag
fields.label: Instagram Tag (Optional)
fields.description: Enter a tag to filter posts by (e.g. novedades, latrobada)

fields.name: limit
fields.label: Total Limit
fields.description: Maximum total number of posts to display

fields.name: maxVisible
fields.label: Max Visible Posts
fields.description: Show up to this many posts at once (e.g. 4). If more are available, a horizontal carousel is created.
